## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear description of the change and why it's needed. Link to a design doc or discussion if relevant. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `test` — tests only (no production code changes)
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring (no behavior change)

## Related issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest` with ≥80% coverage gate)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (no lint errors)
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes (no formatting issues)
- [ ] No regressions — existing behavior is unchanged
- [ ] This PR is focused on a single concern
- [ ] New features/fixes include appropriate tests
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed (README, docstrings, etc.)
